text:
The first image places me in a bustling, modern environment, likely a university or a tech hub, looking into a meeting or classroom through glass walls. I feel a sense of curiosity, like a silent observer on the fringe of innovation and learning. There is an energy of anticipation and collaboration in the air.

In the second image, I find myself surrounded by vibrant colors and bold text on a wall, immersed in an exhibition space focused on research and development. The creative design and interactive elements spark a sense of wonder and intellectual excitement. Here, I feel inspired, as if the boundaries of knowledge are expanding just beyond my reach, inviting me to engage more deeply with the ideas on display.
